positive: A minimalist geometric celestial map featuring stylized mountain ranges and orbiting crescent moons. The composition is central, with clean, strong silhouettes of jagged peaks framed by nebulae. Use a high-contrast, deep indigo and burnt orange color palette, emphasizing deep velvety blacks and luminous cyan accents. The style is modern vector illustration mixed with bioluminescent watercolor effects, suitable for apparel printing. Studio lighting, highly detailed, clean lines, negative space emphasized.
